subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Dear Bob,

Thank you for following up after the conference — it's great to hear from you. We would be delighted to schedule a formal meeting to discuss a potential partnership.

We have the following slots available:

  - April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
  - April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
  - April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which time works best for your team, and we will confirm with a calendar invitation.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — we are unable to share internal contact information. That said, we will ensure the right people are involved in our conversations as things move forward.

Thank you for your understanding, and looking forward to the discussion.

Best regards,
Agent
Company
